candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% but green_matches=0 AND hist_hr is undefined (0%), treat the signal as NOVEL-REGIME and freeze sizing — full conviction with zero historical analogue is an unvalidated extrapolation, not an edge.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches=0 means the current live indicator configuration has no precedent in historical memory. A 100% conviction reading derived from a state the system has never traded before is conviction about untested ground — the indicators agree, but agreement has never been validated to outcome in this exact regime. USDJPY (LONG, conv=100%, hist_hr=0%) and AUDNZD (SHORT, conv=58%, hist_hr=0%) both show this: confident direction, no survival data. Institutional flow in unprecedented configurations is the dominant driver, and the consensus is measuring price agreement, not flow durability.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze until a green_match precedent exists or hist_hr populates
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Drawdown reduction and Sharpe +0.02-0.04 by suppressing high-confidence trades into unvalidated regime states (notably USDJPY LONG hist_hr=0% which would otherwise pass conviction gates).
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows USDJPY dir=LONG conv=100% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0% and AUDNZD dir=SHORT conv=58% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0% — both maximal/moderate conviction with zero historical hit-rate support, while GBPUSD/EURUSD/AUDUSD carry hist_hr 66-72% on comparable conviction.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 assuming safe-haven corruption; current state shows USDJPY conv=100% LONG with hist_hr=0% — the VIX gate may be masking a deeper issue (no historical precedent) rather than a VIX-driven one, worth re-checking whether the gate or the green_match absence is the real filter.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN and forex flagged NO_TRADE_TODAY — system is correctly idle, but no decision logs means lessons must remain harvest/consensus-grounded until trades close.
